description_long: This skateboard features a classic popsicle-shaped deck with a smooth, black surface and slightly upturned nose and tail. The deck appears to be constructed from layered wood, visible along the thin edge, and is topped with a solid black grip tape for traction. Underneath, the skateboard is equipped with two sets of red wheels attached to metal trucks, which are mounted symmetrically near each end. The wheels are of medium size, suitable for street or park use, and the trucks are standard in design, providing stability and maneuverability. The overall finish is sleek and minimalistic, with no visible graphics or branding on the deck or wheels. This skateboard is designed for urban environments, ideal for tricks, commuting, or casual riding.
description: A sleek, black skateboard with a wooden edge, red wheels, and a minimalistic design, featuring standard trucks and solid black grip tape.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the black deck, red wheels, and the layered wooden edge.
description_view_1: End-on view highlighting the width of the deck and the solid black grip tape surface.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the deck, wheels, and wooden edge from the other side.
description_view_3: End-on view from the opposite end, again showing the width and black grip tape of the deck.
attribute_wheel_type: street, medium size, solid red, no visible text or logos
attribute_truck_style: standard, silver metal, top-mounted, no visible branding or unique features
attribute_grip_tape_pattern: solid black, no visible pattern, graphics, or text
